overall.description: A first-person walk through a futuristic cyberpunk city at night, featuring wet streets reflecting vibrant neon lights, pedestrians with holographic umbrellas, and towering modern architecture. The scene transitions from an open sidewalk into a covered underpass with distinctive yellow geometric wall patterns and rainbow floor lighting.

passing pedestrian with purple glowing umbrella walking in opposite direction

person with purple glowing umbrella walking toward camera

tall building facade covered in large digital advertisements and neon signage
tall modern skyscraper with illuminated windows rising above the street
multi-lane road with wet reflective surface mirroring the neon lights
tall poles with green glowing digital signs and overhead lights

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a futuristic cyberpunk city street at night, with the camera walking along a wet concrete sidewalk. A pedestrian with a glowing red umbrella passes closely by, while neon billboards illuminate the towering buildings. The wet asphalt reflects the vibrant city lights as other pedestrians with holographic umbrellas approach and pass by.

scene_state.functional_zone: approaching elevated highway underpass with corporate buildings

events.description: entering the shadow of the elevated highway overpass as the sky becomes obscured
futuristic sports car drives past on the wet road to the right

agents.ego_description: continuing forward along the sidewalk as the environment transitions to a more enclosed space under the overpass

notable_agents.action: futuristic black car driving along the multi-lane road

entered.detail: large concrete and steel bridge structure spanning across the street ahead
building with prominent blue neon ARASAKA corporate signage

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches a massive elevated highway overpass that begins to obscure the sky. The Arasaka building with its distinctive blue neon signage becomes prominent on the right. The lighting shifts to a mix of neon and shadow as the sidewalk enters the covered area, while futuristic vehicles drive past on the wet road.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered pedestrian walkway with yellow geometric wall art and rainbow floor lighting

events.description: passing fully under the overpass into an area with bright yellow honeycomb wall patterns
rainbow-colored neon light strips embedded in the ground become visible along the left side

agents.ego_description: walking through the covered underpass, passing multiple pedestrians with colorful glowing umbrellas

notable_agents.action: person with yellow glowing umbrella walking toward camera
group of pedestrians with various colored holographic umbrellas walking ahead

entered.detail: wall covered in bright yellow geometric hexagonal honeycomb pattern
parallel strips of colorful neon lights embedded in the ground surface
large screen displaying advertisements on the left wall

segments.scene_description: The camera moves deep into the covered underpass where the environment is defined by a striking yellow honeycomb pattern on the left wall and vibrant rainbow neon strips along the ground. The space is fully enclosed by the overpass structure overhead, with pedestrians carrying colorful glowing umbrellas walking in both directions. Large digital billboards line the walls as the walkway continues through the neon-lit tunnel.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from an open, neon-lit cyberpunk street into the enclosed depths of a futuristic underpass. It begins by walking along a wet concrete sidewalk where pedestrians with glowing red and holographic umbrellas pass by under the glare of towering billboards. As the camera approaches a massive elevated highway, the sky is gradually obscured and the lighting shifts into a mix of shadow and blue neon from the prominent Arasaka building. The scene then transitions fully into the covered overpass, where the environment transforms into a tunnel defined by a yellow honeycomb wall pattern and vibrant rainbow neon strips along the ground. Finally, the camera moves deeper into this enclosed space, passing digital billboards and colorful umbrellas within the glowing geometric corridor.
